active_families.thesis: Near-breakeven carry squeeze can become profitable if confined to favorable regimes and cost drag is reduced.
Current polarity likely wrong; v3 flips VTX crossover direction while preserving EMA+CHOP context to test signal polarity cleanly.
Signal has adequate trade density but loses in trend regime; isolate transitional regime before touching risk geometry.
Edge signal remains unproven due to N=1 trade; relaxed funding threshold should increase sample size without changing core logic.
Funding-reversion thesis is asset-agnostic; transfer to SOL for higher liquidity and better sample frequency.

abandoned_this_cycle.reason: Multiple variants produced zero trades; Donchian touch architecture remains over-constrained and non-informative.
Persistent weak edge with anti-correlation signs and no compelling improvement path relative to stronger families.
Two consecutive hard fails with very low trade count and PF=0; replaced by counterswing polarity branch.

new_this_cycle.thesis: Transfer funding dislocation logic to SOL to test whether BANANA scarcity is a market-specific sample issue.

lifecycle_outcomes.notes: No strategy reached QScore >= 1.0 this reflection cycle.
